title: BouncyCraft
description: every block is now bouncy like slime blocks
body:
Ever wondered how would Minecraft be if every block was bouncy like Slime Blocks, stop wondering and download the mod!

This mod apparently works in servers aswell only by downloading on the client, enjoy it on servers without anticheat, also, to make all blocks bouncy like regular slime blocks, use the "Regular" version (available for 1.16.5 Fabric or 1.21.X Fabric, Forge and NeoForge) or else if you want to make all blocks super bouncy, download the "Extreme" version (only available 1.16.5 Fabric), it makes you bounce exponentially

There is no config, just install the mod, put it in the mod folder, this requires Java 17 (1.16.5) and Java 21 (1.21.X) and when you load into a world or server this should work.

Discord (if you need help): https://discord.com/invite/VHUpFcEeuH

YouTube video for which i made the mod:
